name: Einsteinium
appearance: A radioactive metal, only a few milligrams of which are made each year.
uses: Einsteinium has no uses outside research.
naturalAbundance: Einsteinium can be obtained in milligram quantities from the neutron bombardment of plutonium in a nuclear reactor.
biologicalRole: Einsteinium has no known biological role. It is toxic due to its radioactivity.
